calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Steven Williams, Esq., for Plaintiff John Gianaras also present.
No appearance by the Defendants.
Brett Collins, Esq. for Defendant Guitar Center Stores, Inc.
Plaintiff and Defendant, Guitar Center Stores, Inc. stipulated for Judgment and Settlement Agreement in writting, for possession of the premises located at 1339 Mission St., San Francisco. Rental agreement is forfeited, plaintiff waives any and all claims for unpaid rent, damages, costs and attorney's fees.
09:45 am. - Plaintiff's witness John Glanaras was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Notice to Perform Convenant or Quit----- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants: Nick Metzger aka Nicholas Metzger aka Nick Mezger ind/dba Awards by Opympic aka Awards by Olympic aka Olympic Dist., Bill Tichy aka Bela F. Tichy ind/dba Awards by Opympic aka Awards by Olympic aka Olympic Dist., Margaret Tichy ind/dba Awards by Opympic aka Awards by Olympic aka Olympic Dist., for restitution and possession of the premises located at: 1339 Mission St., San Francisco.
Unpaid rent $9,259.47
Rental Damages of $11,758.15
Attorney's Fees and costs of $7,874.81
For the total of $28,892.43
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibits, judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
